export const STATUS_COLORS = {
  CREATED: '#003087',
  IN_TRANSIT_WILAYA: '#1e5bb8',
  AT_WILAYA_DEPOT: '#0f8a54',

};

  regional: { label: 'Regional Depot', color: '#0f8a54', icon: 'WD' },
  gas: { label: 'Gas Station', color: '#d68b00', icon: 'GS' },

export const MODAL_TITLES = {
